componentDescription: A UI component for selecting colors from a palette, with options for custom input and recent selections.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for the component.

name.description: An optional name attribute for the component, useful for form submissions.

label.description: An optional label to display alongside the color picker.

placeholder.description: An optional placeholder text to display when no color is selected.

helperText.description: An optional helper text to provide additional context or instructions.

value.description: The current controlled color value of the picker in string format (e.g., '#RRGGBB').

defaultValue.description: The initial uncontrolled color value of the picker in string format.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when the color value changes, receiving the new color string.

onChangeComplete.description: Callback function triggered when the color selection process is complete (e.g., mouse up after drag), receiving the final color string.

views.description: Custom styles to apply to different parts of the color picker component.

size.description: Defines the size of the color picker component (e.g., 'small', 'medium', 'large').

shape.description: Defines the shape of the color picker component (e.g., 'square', 'rounded', 'circle').

variant.description: Defines the visual variant of the color picker component (e.g., 'outline', 'filled').

error.description: Indicates if the color picker is in an error state.

isDisabled.description: Indicates if the color picker is disabled and cannot be interacted with.

isReadOnly.description: Indicates if the color picker is read-only, allowing selection but not modification.

typeValues: { name: string; value: string; category?: string; }
predefinedColors.description: An array of predefined colors for quick selection.

showCustomInput.description: Determines whether to display a custom input field for color values.

showRecentColors.description: Determines whether to display a section for recently selected colors.

colorFormat.description: Specifies the format for color values (e.g., 'hex', 'rgb', 'hsl').

maxRecentColors.description: The maximum number of recent colors to display.

isOpen.description: Controls the open/closed state of the color picker dropdown.

onOpen.description: Callback function triggered when the color picker dropdown is opened.

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when the color picker dropdown is closed.

closeOnSelect.description: Determines if the dropdown should automatically close after a color is selected.

aria-label.description: ARIA label for accessibility, providing a descriptive name for the component.

aria-describedby.description: ARIA property to associate the component with an element that describes it.
